verses.text: Israel' tapate: Reuben, Simeon, Levi, Judah, Issakhar, Zebulun
Dan, Josef, Benjamin, Naftali, Gad, leh Asher ahi uh hi.
Judah' tapate: Er, Onan, leh Shelah ahi uh hi. Hih thumte pen Kanaan mi Bathshua tawh a neih ahi hi. Judah' tacil Er pen Topa' muhna-ah gamtat hoihlo ahih manin Topa in amah that hi
A tapa' zi Tamar in zong amah tawh Perez leh Zerah nei hi. Judah in a vekpi-in tapa nga nei hi
Perez' tapate: Hezron leh Hamul ahi uh hi
Zerah' tapate: Zimri, Ethan, Heman, Kalkol, leh Dara, a vekpi-in nga pha uh hi
Karmi' tapa: A ki-ap nate-ah a khial, Israel mite a nawngkaisak Akhan ahi hi
Tua ciangin Ethan' tapa Azariah ahi hi
Ama sung panin a suak Hezron' tapate: Jerahmeel, Ram, leh Khelubai ahi uh hi
Ram pen Amminadab' pa hi a, Amminadab pen Judah' tapate' sung pan ulian Nahshon' pa ahi hi
Nahshon pen Salma' pa, Salma pen Boaz' pa
Boaz pen Obed' pa, Obed pen Jessi' pa ahi hi
Jessi in a tacil Eliab, a nihna Abinadab, a thumna Shimea
a lina Nethanel, a ngana Raddai
a gukna Ozem, a sagihna David a nei hi
Amau' sanggam numeite Zeruiah leh Abigail ahi uh hi. Zeruiah' tapate: Abishai, Joab, leh Asahel, thum pha uh hi
Abigail in Amasa nei a, Amasa' pa pen Ishmael mi Jether ahi hi
Hezron' tapa Kaleb in a zi Azubah leh Jerioth tawh ta nei hi. Ama tate: Jesher, Shobab, leh Ardon ahi uh hi
Azubah a sih ciangin Kaleb in Efrath ten'pihin, tuanu in amah tawh Hur nei hi
Hur pen Uri' pa hi a, Uri pen Bezalel' pa ahi hi
Ama khan' kum sawmguk a phak ciangin Hezron in a ten'pih, Gilead' pa Makhir' tanu luppih hi. Tuanu in amah tawh Segub nei hi
Segub pen Jair' pa hi a, Gilead gam sungah khuapi sawmnihlethum nei hi
Ahih hangin Geshur leh Aram in amaute tung panin Havvothjair khua leh Kenath leh a khuaneute, khua sawmguk la hi. Hihte khempeuh pen Gilead' pa Makhir' suanlekhakte ahi uh hi
Hezron a sih khit ciangin Kaleb in a pa Hezron' zi Efrath luppih a, tuanu in amah tawh Tekoa khuapi a sat Ashhur a nei hi
Hezron' tacil Jerahmeel' tapate: A tacil Ram, Bunah, Oren, leh Ahijah ahi uh hi
Jerahmeel in zi dang khat zong nei a, a min Atarah ahi hi. Amah pen Onam' nu ahi hi
Jerahmeel' tacil Ram' tapate: Maaz, Jamin, leh Eker ahi uh hi
Onam' tapate: Shammai leh Jada ahi uh hi. Shammai' tapate: Nadab leh Abishur ahi uh hi
Abishur' zi' min Abihail hi a, tuanu in amah tawh Ahban leh Molid nei hi
Nadab' tapate: Seled leh Appaim ahi uh hi. Seled in ta neiloin si hi
Appaim' tapa Ishi ahi hi. Ishi' tapa Sheshan ahi hi. Sheshan' tapa Ahlai ahi hi
Tua ciangin Shammai' sanggampa Jada' tapate: Jether leh Jonathan ahi uh hi. Jether in ta neiloin si hi
Jonathan' tapate: Peleth leh Zaza ahi uh hi. Hihte pen Jerahmeel' suanlekhakte ahi uh hi
Sheshan in tapa neiloin tanu bek nei hi. Ahih hangin Sheshan in Jarha min nei Egypt sila khat nei hi
Tua ahih ciangin Sheshan in a sila Jarha tungah a zi dingin a tanu pia a, tuanu in Attai nei hi
Attai pen Nathan' pa hi a, Nathan pen Zabad' pa ahi hi
Zabad pen Eflal' pa hi a, Eflal pen Obed' pa ahi hi
Obed pen Jehu' pa hi a, Jehu pen Azariah' pa ahi hi
Azariah pen Helez' pa hi a, Helez pen Eleasah' pa ahi hi
Eleasah pen Sismai' pa hi a, Sismai pen Shallum' pa ahi hi
Shallum pen Jekamiah' pa hi a, Jekamiah pen Elishama' pa ahi hi
Jerahmeel' sanggampa Kaleb' tapa: Zif' pa ahi a tacil Mareshah ahi hi. Mareshah' tapa Hebron ahi hi
Hebron' tapate: Korah, Tappuah, Rekem, leh Shema ahi uh hi
Shema pen Raham' pa hi a, Raham pen Jorkeam' pa ahi hi. Rekem pen Shema' sanggam hi a, Shammai' pa ahi hi
Shammai' tapa Maon hi a, Maon pen Bethzur' pa ahi hi
Kaleb' zineu Efah in Haran, Moza, leh Gazez nei a, Haran in Gazez kici tapa khat nei hi
Jahdai' tapate: Regem, Jotham, Geshan, Pelet, Efah, leh Shaaf ahi uh hi
Kaleb' zineu Maakah in Sheber leh Tirhanah nei hi
Tua ciangin tapa nih nei leuleu a, Madmannah khuapi a sat Shaaf, leh Makbenah khuapi leh Gibea khuapi a sat Sheva ahi uh hi. Kaleb in tanu khat zong nei a, a min Aksah ahi hi
Hih a nuai-ate zong Kaleb' suanlekhakte ahi uh hi. Kaleb' zi Efrath' tacil Hur' tapate: Kiriathjearim khuapi a sat Shobal
Bethlehem khuapi a sat Shalma, leh Bethgader khuapi a sat Haref ahi uh hi
Kiriathjearim khuapi a sat Shobal in tapa nei hi: Haroeh mite leh Menuhoth gama mi alangte' pian'na ahi hi
Tua ciangin Kiriathjearim khuasungah a tengte: Ithri mite, Puth mite, Shumath mite, leh Mishrai mite ahi uh hi. Hihte sung panin Zorah mite leh Eshtaol mite hong piang hi
Bethlehem khuapi a sat Salma' suante: Netofah mite, Atrothbethjoab mite, leh Zorah mi ahi Manahath minam nih sung pan alang ahi hi
Jabez-ah a teng laithei minamte: Tirath mite, Shimeath mite, leh Sukath mite ahi uh hi. Hihte pen Rekhab minamte tawh a kiteng Ken mite ahi uh hi.
